message:
feat(network): add DHCP config file generation

Add WriteConfig method to DHCPServer that generates dnsmasq
configuration files from a template, including DHCP range, router,
DNS server, lease file path, and logging settings.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
